/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ecl_test_cartesian_points.dir/cartesian_points.cpp.o  -o /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/ecl_geometry/ecl_test_cartesian_points   -L/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest/lib:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib ../../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_geometry.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_linear_algebra.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_formatters.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_exceptions.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_errors.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_type_traits.so -lpthread
